MySQL 5.7 community EOL October 2023; Cloud SQL extended support starts February 1, 2025 (charges waived Feb-Apr 2025, billing from May 1, 2025). Deprecation date: February 1, 2028.
MySQL 8.0 community EOL April 2026; Cloud SQL extended support starts January 1, 2027. Deprecation date: July 1, 2029.
PostgreSQL 9.6 upstream EOL November 2021; Cloud SQL extended support starts February 1, 2025 (charges waived Feb-Apr 2025, billing from May 1, 2025). Deprecation date: February 1, 2028.
